name: Compound Name
abstract: A multiple part name, consisting of a set of strings with functional roles that can be combined into single string using a template.

examples.title: Example CompoundName
examples.content: A name with a label, but also a set of parts with roles that can be validated against content rules.

examples.title: Referenced Parts
examples.content: An example name where part of the name is a reference to a vocabulary source.  This can us used for validation and multi-linual applications

annotatedSchema:
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
description: Compound Name
anyOf:
- required:
  - label
- required:
  - hasPart
additionalProperties: true
properties:
  label:
    anyOf:
    - type: 'null'
    - type: string
    x-jsonld-id: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label
  template:
    type: string
  hasPart:
    type: array
    items:
      type: object
      additionalProperties: false
      properties:
        label:
          type: string
          x-jsonld-id: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label
        ref:
          $ref: https://opengeospatial.github.io/bblocks/annotated-schemas/ogc-utils/iri-or-curie/schema.yaml
          x-jsonld-id: https://w3id.org/ogc/utils/label/namePartRef
        type:
          $ref: https://opengeospatial.github.io/bblocks/annotated-schemas/ogc-utils/iri-or-curie/schema.yaml
          x-jsonld-id: https://w3id.org/ogc/utils/label/namePartType
      anyOf:
      - required:
        - label
      - required:
        - ref
    x-jsonld-id: http://purl.org/dc/terms/hasPart
x-jsonld-extra-terms:
  name: https://w3id.org/ogc/utils/label/name
  CompoundName: https://w3id.org/ogc/utils/label/CompoundName
x-jsonld-prefixes:
  commonpatterns: https://w3id.org/ogc/utils/label/
  dct: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
  rdfs: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
